description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a symmetrical facade. The front yard features a row of tall, narrow cypress trees and two palm trees flanking a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The house has multiple large windows arranged in neat rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. On one side of the property, there is a rectangular swimming pool with lounge chairs nearby, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the landscaping is minimalistic yet elegant. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of Mediterranean and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with symmetrical windows, a landscaped front yard with cypress and palm trees, and a side swimming pool. The exterior is light-colored and features clean, geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical rows of windows, cypress and palm trees, and the pool area to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool, lounge chairs, and the alignment of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows, open terrace areas, and the tops of the cypress trees visible over the roofline.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the front landscaping, palm trees, and the overall layout of the house and yard.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entry with a paved walkway, flanked by palm trees and cypress trees, no porch or overhang.
